This is a large file with many uncovered branches in parameter validation, type coercion, and format handling. Key areas to focus on:
1. Parameter type coercion edge cases (lines 455-472)
2. Validation format handling (lines 593-667) - regex patterns, URI, email, date-time formats
3. Parameter group resolution (lines 1017-1037)
4. Display/Debug impls for parameter types (lines 1201-1307)
5. Default value handling edge cases

Prioritize testing validation format handling as it has the most meaningful untested logic.
Add tests for parameters.rs uncovered parameter type handling
